pi_items.source: Verified in verifier.py (line 52): 'if res >= 10:' is the threshold for full points. Ocean modifier resolution parameter in Blender controls simulation detail level (https://docs.blender.org/manual/en/latest/modeling/modifiers/physics/ocean.html).

Verified in verifier.py (line 63): 'if 20 <= size <= 200:'. Spatial_size parameter in Blender Ocean modifier represents the size of simulation domain in meters (https://docs.blender.org/api/current/bpy.types.OceanModifier.html).
Verified in verifier.py (line 91): 'if 0.5 <= height <= 15.0:'. Camera height is measured as Z-coordinate in Blender (export_result.sh line 128).
Verified in verifier.py (line 103): 'if size_kb > 50:' is the threshold for full render quality points.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task requiring creation of a photorealistic ocean seascape in Blender. The task uses Blender 5.x with Ocean modifier parameters: minimum resolution of 10 (controls viewport/render quality), spatial size range 20-200 meters (simulation domain size). The scene requires: warm sunset world background with Red > 0.3 and Red > Blue in RGB; a Sun light with Z-direction component > -0.9 (not pointing straight down); camera positioned at height 0.5-15 meters; and output image saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/ocean_render.png with minimum size 50 KB. All metadata values are consistent with verification logic and Blender API specifications.
